posts.title: Massive Pothole near the Main Gate
posts.description: There is a severe pothole right outside the main campus gate causing massive traffic delays and potentially damaging vehicles. Needs urgent municipal attention.
posts.author: user-uuid-2

posts.title: Lost Wallet (Black Leather)
posts.description: I misplaced my black leather wallet near the library cafeteria yesterday. It contains my ID cards and debit card. Reward for the finder!
posts.author: user-uuid-3

posts.title: Upcoming Career Fair 2026
posts.description: The annual Career Fair is scheduled for next Friday. Top tech companies and startups will be visiting. Don't forget to register through the portal!
posts.author: user-uuid-1

posts.title: Tech Symposium & Hackathon
posts.description: Join us for 48 hours of uninterrupted coding. Free food, great prizes, and amazing networking opportunities with industry mentors.
posts.author: user-uuid-1

posts.title: Unscheduled Power Outage
posts.description: Block B has been facing random power outages for the last 3 hours. The backup generators seem to be malfunctioning.
posts.author: user-uuid-2

posts.title: Found: AirPods Case
posts.description: Found a white AirPods case (without the actual AirPods) near the chemistry lab on the second floor. Handed it over to the security desk.
posts.author: user-uuid-3

posts.title: Streetlight Broken on 5th Avenue
posts.description: Its completely dark on 5th avenue road leading from the station. The second streetlight has been shattered.
posts.author: user-uuid-2

posts.title: Campus Music Fest 2026
posts.description: Get ready for the biggest music festival of the year! Local indie bands and a surprise DJ set. Book tickets now.
posts.author: user-uuid-1

posts.title: Exam Schedule Revision
posts.description: Due to the upcoming state elections, the end-semester exam dates have been pushed back by one week. Check the portal.
posts.author: user-uuid-1

posts.title: Stray Dogs near Canteen
posts.description: There is a pack of aggressive stray dogs near the back completely blocking student access to the second canteen area. Authorities need to handle this humanely.
posts.author: user-uuid-3

comments.text: I almost tripped over it today morning! Thanks for reporting.
comments.author: user-uuid-3

comments.text: Authorities have been notified, scheduling repair for next week.
comments.author: user-uuid-1

comments.text: I think I saw it sitting on the third bench near the window. Check with the librarian!

comments.text: We've raised a ticket with the electricity board.
